title: Irish Bacon Crumble
description: A sweet and savory crumble dessert using irish bacon. Perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry and place it in a baking dish.
Cut the irish bacon into small pieces and cook in a pan until crispy.
Mix the sugar and fermented apple together in a bowl.
Add the cooked bacon to the apple mixture and stir.
Pour the apple mixture into the pastry-lined baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the pastry is golden brown.
